tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
I've been havin dreams[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Jumpin on a trampoline[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
Flippin in the air[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]
I never land just float there[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gm[/ch]
As I'm looking up[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
Suddenly the sky erupts[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Flames alight the trees[/tab]

Spread to fallin leaves
[tab]              [ch]Cm[/ch]
Now they're right upon me[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Wait if I'm on fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]
When I dream of dying[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
I never feel so loved[/tab]
